z2_sites.PHE357: Primary Z² aromatic (Domain III, EGF binding)

off_targets.HER2: No ligand binding site - easy selectivity

key_selectivity_insight.HER2: Target EGF binding site (HER2 has none)
key_selectivity_insight.HER3: Require PHE357 Z² stacking (HER3 has LEU)

selectivity_anchors.anchor: Anchor@Ligand binding domain: EGFR=EGF/TGF-α binding site (score=0.95)
selectivity_anchors.strategy: Design EGF-competitive peptide - HER2 cannot bind (no ligand site)
Z² stacking with PHE357 - HER3 has LEU, no aromatic stacking
H-bond to TYR45 OH - HER2 has PHE (no OH)
Exploit different H-bonding partners at this position

peptide_designs.name: EGFR_Z2_EGF_001
peptide_designs.selectivity: EGF-competitive binding at Domain III - HER2 has no ligand binding site

peptide_designs.name: EGFR_Z2_DUAL_001
peptide_designs.selectivity: Bridges Domain I and III - requires intact EGFR ligand binding site

peptide_designs.name: EGFR_Z2_antiHER3_001
peptide_designs.selectivity: Heavy aromatic dependence - HER3 LEU357 cannot provide Z² stacking

peptide_designs.name: EGFR_Z2_MIN_001
peptide_designs.selectivity: Minimal peptide with key selectivity contacts

best_design.name: EGFR_Z2_EGF_001
best_design.rationale: EGF-competitive at Domain III + Z² with PHE357 + TYR45 H-bond

delivery_system.advantage: Self-limiting feedback loop prevents over-geometrically stabilize
